preReview.title: Philadelphia Union v New York City FC: Jansen lauds resilience as strongest trait
preReview.description: Two of the top three in the Eastern Conference will go head-to-head on Sunday as the Philadelphia Union host New York City FC.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union vs New York City FC: Jansen elogia la resiliencia como su mayor virtud
preReview.description: Dos de los tres primeros en la Conferencia Este se enfrentarán el domingo cuando el Philadelphia Union reciba al New York City FC.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union contro New York City FC: Jansen loda la resilienza come principale qualità
preReview.description: Due delle prime tre squadre della Eastern Conference si affronteranno domenica quando i Philadelphia Union ospiteranno il New York City FC.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union x New York City FC: Jansen elogia resiliência como maior qualidade
preReview.description: Os dois dos três melhores da Conferência Leste se enfrentarão no domingo, quando o Philadelphia Union receberá o New York City FC.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union v New York City FC : Jansen salue la résilience comme principal atout
preReview.description: Deux des trois meilleures équipes de la Conférence Est s'affronteront dimanche alors que le Philadelphia Union accueille le New York City FC.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union gegen New York City FC: Jansen lobt Durchhaltevermögen als stärkste Eigenschaft
preReview.description: Zwei der Top drei der Eastern Conference treten am Sonntag gegeneinander an, wenn die Philadelphia Union New York City FC empfangen.

preReview.title: فيلادلفيا يونيون ضد نيويورك سيتي إف سي: يانسن يشيد بالصمود كأقوى سمة
preReview.description: سيواجه اثنان من الفرق الثلاثة الأولى في المؤتمر الشرقي بعضهما البعض يوم الأحد، حيث يستضيف فيلادلفيا يونيون فريق نيويورك سيتي إف سي.

preReview.title: Philadelphia Union x New York City FC: Jansen destaca resiliência como principal característica
preReview.description: Dois dos três primeiros colocados na Conferência Leste se enfrentarão no domingo, enquanto o Philadelphia Union recebe o New York City FC.

QAData.question: Who won between Philadelphia Union and New York City FC on Sat, 04 Oct 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Philadelphia Union won 1–0 over New York City FC on Sat, 04 Oct 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
